**Shadow:** misusing `singleton` at rune 0097 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0098] source of truth {#rune-0098}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The place other copies are supposed to agree with.

**Shadow:** misusing `source of truth` at rune 0098 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

**Pocket gloss:** The place other copies are supposed to agree with.

### [0099] stack {Arch} {#rune-0099}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `stack` in its Arch sense is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the stack obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `stack` at rune 0099 in the Arch lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0100] stage {Arch} {#rune-0100}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `stage` in its Arch sense is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the stage obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `stage` at rune 0100 in the Arch lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0101] state machine {#rune-0101}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Behavior expressed as named states and legal transitions.

**Shadow:** misusing `state machine` at rune 0101 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

**Pocket gloss:** Behavior expressed as named states and legal transitions.

### [0102] strategy {#rune-0102}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `strategy` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the strategy obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `strategy` at rune 0102 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0103] subsystem {#rune-0103}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `subsystem` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the subsystem obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `subsystem` at rune 0103 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0104] surface {#rune-0104}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `surface` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the surface obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `surface` at rune 0104 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0105] system {#rune-0105}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `system` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the system obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `system` at rune 0105 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0106] template method {#rune-0106}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `template method` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the template method obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `template method` at rune 0106 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0107] tree {#rune-0107}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `tree` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the tree obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `tree` at rune 0107 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0108] use case {#rune-0108}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `use case` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the use case obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `use case` at rune 0108 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0109] value object {#rune-0109}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `value object` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the value object obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `value object` at rune 0109 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0110] worker {#rune-0110}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `worker` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the worker obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `worker` at rune 0110 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0111] workflow {#rune-0111}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `workflow` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the workflow obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `workflow` at rune 0111 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.

### [0112] wrapper {#rune-0112}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `wrapper` is a architecture and design rune for separate responsibility, boundary, and interface decisions; use it when the artifact needs the wrapper obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `wrapper` at rune 0112 in the architecture lane can let ownership can blur across layers; verify by requiring the caster to name the owning artifact and the caller-visible contract.
